title: Lophia
description: A cute pastel pack perfect for Pvp and Build !
body:
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afd51cd5ab2b99949dd149bc1390b177c287f6e3.png)

► This pack will have updates over time, modifying certain textures and adding certain functionalities

► A 16x texture pack perfect for mini-games and survival/SMP

► It modifies the aspects of the menus and some items that can give you an advantage

► Contains custom 3D models like for the bed in 1.8

► Contains some animated textures
